line_items.description: QD Coupler ISO 7241-A (AG), 3/8" Body, 3/8 NPT F, Chrome-Plated Steel
line_items.notes: Referenced against Rig RED-07 / Pump Assy SN 4X-H42-11798

known_ambiguities: No PO number — derive from filename (redline_urgent_2026-04-19.pdf)
Delivery is literal callout 'ASAP — RIG DOWN', not a structured date
Rig serial reference (RED-07, SN 4X-H42-11798) in notes is customer context, not a line item
known_conflicts: HYD-QCA-06-STL has 4-day lead time per master; 'ASAP' (rig down) implies same/next day — not achievable without expedite sourcing
